hooks.prompt: If a file was just written under wiki/concepts/ or wiki/sources/, ask the user: '要为这个知识点生成 Flux 概念插画吗？' If they say yes, generate an image using Flux with the prompt '[节点标题] concept illustration, flat design, knowledge graph node, minimal color palette, white background, educational diagram, clean vector style', save to _attachments/assets/[node-slug].png, add the thumbnail field to the concept/source page frontmatter, and embed the image in the page. If they say no, do nothing.
